raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ca XXXI. Nodalla.
Ezekiels fluddina wehí prett to Kehninu Wa-
rāu: 1. Ka wiꞥſch preekſch Nebukadnez-
jara ne warrehs paſtaſweheht/ kaſ to Kehninu
no Azirjas/ kaſ jo spehzigs bija neka
wiꞥſch. irr uſwarrejs: 3.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N weenpadeſinitā Gad-
dā trefchā Mehneſi/ pir-
ta Deendā tahs Meh-
nes/ notike ta KUnga Wahrs
us man/ kaſ fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Tu Zilweka Behrns/ run-
na us Baraff to Egiptes Kehnt-
nu/ un us winna Draudsſi kut-
kam eſti tu lihds eefsch tanwas
Angſtbas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Raugi/ Affurs btja weeng
Zeedra-Kohks us to Lthbanu ar
fraiſeem Sarreem/ tin kuplahm
Lappahn/ un augſtu Zelmu/un
winna Wirſ-Gals bija ſtarp ref-
neem Sarreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Tas Uhdens darrija win-
nu leelu/ un tee Dſikumi pa-
augſtinaja winnu/ tee gahje ar
fawahin Straumeim apkahrt/
kur wiꞥſch dehſtihte bija/ un ſuh-
tija ſawus Strautus pee wi-
feem Kohkeim Laukā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Tapehz tappe winna Zelms
augſtaks neka wiſſi Kohki wirs
Lauka/ un winna Sarri waſro-
jahs/ un winna Sarrini pagar-
tinajahs zaur to leelu Uhdeni/
rad wiꞥſch iſplauke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Wiſſi Putni appafſch
Debes darrija rigſdus appakſch
winna Sarreem / un wiſſi
Swchri Laukā weddahs ap-
pakſch winna Sarreem/ un wi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "fas leelas Tautas fehdeja win-
Pahwehni.
7. Ta bija tas ſkaifſis fat
Leeſuma/ un fatvu Sarru Ga-
rumā / jo winna Saſne bi-
pee daudf lihdenim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Tee Zeedra-Kohkt de a-
tumschoja winna Deewa Dah-
ſā/ un tahs Preedes ne bija wi-
na Sarreem lihdsas/ un tee Ku-
ſtanu-Kohkt ne bija lihdsī win-
Sarriſeem / neweens Kohk-
Deewa Dahrsā bija winnam lih-
dsi ſawā Skaitsumā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Es biju winnu tik ſkaifti-
darrijs zaue to Watrumu win-
na Sarru/ ka wiſſi Kohki eefsch-
Eedenes/ kaſ Deewa Dahrsā bi-
ja winnu ſkaudeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Tapehz ta ſakka tas
KUngs KUNGS: Tadeht ka-
tu ta eſti zehlees Gattuma/ ir ka-
wiſſch ſawu Wirſ-Gallu ſieepe
vahe to reſno Sarro Widdu/
un winna Sirde ſawa Angſiu-
ma deht leppo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Tapehz nodewu es win-
nu tam Wiſſuwarrenam ſtarp
teem Paganceem Kohkā/ ka tas
ka titſkams ar winnu darritu/es
tedsinnu winnu winna Beſdce-
wibas deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un Sweschee/ tee wiſſu-
breeſmitgaki ſtarp teem Paga-
ceem/ iſfakneja winnu/ un at-
ſahje winnu/ winna Sarri kriſ-
te us teem Kalneem un wiſſas
Geſeiſas/ un winna Sarriat
tappe falauſiti pee wiſſeem
Strauteem tahs ſennnes. un
wiſſas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
